name: Mango
description: Tropical fruit tree with glossy leaves and sweet yellow-orange fruit.
nutrition: Rich in vitamin C, vitamin A, and dietary fiber.
growth_tips: Needs warm climate, full sun, and well-drained soil.
health_info: Healthy trees show green leaves and steady new growth.

name: Pizza
description: Baked flatbread topped with tomato sauce, cheese, and toppings.
nutrition: Calories vary; cheese adds protein and fat, crust adds carbs.
health_info: Moderate portions are healthier; add vegetables for balance.

name: Dog
description: Domesticated canine with diverse breeds and sizes.
growth_tips: Provide regular exercise, fresh water, and balanced diet.
health_info: Healthy dogs are alert, active, and have clear eyes.

name: Laptop
description: Portable computer with built-in screen, keyboard, and battery.
health_info: Keep vents clear and use on flat surfaces to avoid overheating.
